title: brachyglottis × lapidosa
intro: Brachyglottis × lapidosa, also known as Pittosporum crassifolium, is a hybrid plant species in the Pittosporaceae family that is native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Brachyglottis × lapidosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating coughs, colds, and skin infections. Brachyglottis × lapidosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
